headline: Palantir (PLTR) Secures DISA Authorization for PFCS Forward Cloud Service
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) is one of the best stocks for 20 years. On February 12, Palantir announced that the Defense Information Systems Agency authorized the Palantir Federal Cloud Service/PFCS Forward. This milestone extends Palantir’s existing Impact Level 5 and Impact Level 6 Provisional Authorizations to include on-premises and edge deployments. The tech stack (encompassing […]
